# resvg test suite (vendored)

SVG test files vendored from the resvg test suite:
https://github.com/linebender/resvg-test-suite

Copyright (c) 2018 Reizner Evgeniy. Licensed under the MIT License (see LICENSE).

These are used as a static-SVG rendering conformance corpus for
`Starling.Paint`'s SVG decoder. One Starling test case matches each `.svg`
file under `tests/` (see `tests/Starling.Paint.Tests/Svg/ResvgCorpus*.cs`).
`results.csv` is the upstream per-renderer scoreboard, kept for reference.
